name: Olomana Three Peaks
tagline: Oahu's most thrilling ridge scramble — first peak is earned, second is gutsy, third is borderline reckless.
parking: Free parking at the loop on Royal Hawaiian Golf Club access road off Auloa Road in Kailua
bestTime: Start at sunrise to beat the heat — the exposed ridgeline gets brutally hot by midday
talkStory: About 4.5 miles round trip to all three peaks with 1,600 ft elevation gain. Most people turn around after the first peak (1,643 ft) and honestly that's the smart move — the views are already incredible. Peaks two and three involve serious scrambling with rope assists and knife-edge ridges. People have died on this trail, no joke. Wear grippy shoes, bring gloves, and never go when it's wet. Not a trail to wing it on.
